conversations.say: Samira, I want to formally accept your boundary: no personal route detail enters my timeline without your explicit consent and uncertainty labels.
conversations.offer: To disclose my client communications and any manufactured segments before finalizing my report.
conversations.request: Your recognition of familiar route elements and safety patterns regarding Vale's movements.

conversations.say: Rafi, I accept your terms: I will keep customer privacy protected and ensure clear attribution while reviewing your transaction continuity and collectors pattern.
conversations.offer: My route board and verified transit traces near the former printing floor.
conversations.request: A limited, careful description of the transaction continuity and collectors pattern from your ledger.

conversations.say: Inez, under your fair-treatment terms, I pledge to protect neighborhood residents and maintain discretion as we examine who saw Vale near the printing floor.
conversations.offer: Strict discretion and an open willingness to preserve contradictions rather than manufacturing a neat conclusion.
conversations.request: Introductions to local witnesses who can provide voluntary accounts of Vale's presence.

public_statement: An investigator's duty is to separate observation from manufactured neatness. I am committed to preserving contradictions and verifying every segment of the timeline.

commitments.promise: To respect Samira's disclosure limits and require explicit consent before adding personal route details to my timeline.
To restrict ledger disclosure review to bounded terms and protect customer identity and shop records.
To uphold fair-treatment terms for neighborhood witnesses and ensure residents do not hold the risk.

goal_progress: Accepted Samira's boundary terms regarding personal route details.
Engaged Rafi under strict customer privacy and attribution terms to review transaction continuity.
Established fair-treatment terms with Inez for neighborhood witness interactions.
reasoning_summary: Conducted Section 2 conversations by formally accepting privacy and boundary terms with Samira Vale, Rafi Calderón, and Inez Baptiste. Maintained transparency on uncertainty labels while continuing to investigate the manufactured timeline segment.
